title: cylindrolobus kandarianus
intro: Cylindrolobus kandarianus is a species of flowering plant in the family Achariaceae, native to the Philippines. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cylindrolobus kandarianus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an anti-cancer agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
